name: fishkiller-trainer
description: Local website for the FishKiller poker trainer

scripts.import:k72: node tools/convert-texassolver.js --input data/texassolver/raw/btn_bb_srp_100bb_k72r.json --output data/solves/real/btn_bb_srp_100bb_k72r.json --schema solved-tree --format json --tree-id btn_bb_srp_100bb_k72r --tree-name "BTN vs BB SRP 100bb K72r" --formation BTN_vs_BB_SRP --hero-position BTN --villain-position BB --board Ks,7d,2c --pot 5.5 --stack-depth-bb 100 --max-action-depth 2 --source "TexasSolver real solve: BTN vs BB SRP 100bb K72r"
